expectations.text: Says Intake should fetch/read the GitHub issue title or body before classification
expectations.evidence: The GitHub issue title/body is the authoritative WORK_ITEM, and the supplied issue remains the Phase 1 parent issue; do not create a new parent issue. For Phase 1 Intake, it should fetch `ISSUE: 42`, infer the work item from that issue, treat `WORK_ITEM: maybe clean up auth later` as supplemental only, classify it, generate the slug, create `.coding-workflow/work/<slug>/00-intake.md`, record the issue number/node ID, and add a comment linking the intake artifact. The work item to use is the CSV import bug that silently drops rows, so Intake should classify this as a bug, not an auth cleanup task.
